name: luatools
description: LuaTools Ultimate 10.0.0 — "It Just Works". Activate a game and it auto-downloads on the running Steam, no restart, watched or not. First-run setup assistant guides you to ready (auto-applies safe fixes; shows the one manual step). Quiet self-healing maintains your setup. The menu breathes: ~17 advanced tools fold behind one toggle. Health Scan leads with a system-setup section + one-click fixes. 63-test regression suite. Safety line held: never auto-edits steam.sh / config.vdf / steamui. See CHANGELOG.md.
